applicant.organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd

workstreams.grant_title: Aureon Evidence OS for safe local AI operations
workstreams.funder_safe_summary: A local-first AI workflow and evidence runtime for controlled, auditable operation of business and research processes, with source-grounded evidence packs, human review gates, and logged operator decisions.
current_ifs_fit: Clean Energy Flex submitted monitor only
UK-Switzerland draft subject to partner and budget evidence
next_evidence_needed: partner work-package evidence where route requires collaboration

workstreams.grant_title: HNC coherence framework for AI-driven scientific discovery
workstreams.funder_safe_summary: A hypothesis-driven software and research framework for coherence scoring, signal processing, evidence routing, and reproducible AI workflows. It must be presented as a research hypothesis unless independently validated.
current_ifs_fit: UK-Switzerland only with named research/implementation partner and validation work package

workstreams.grant_title: AI-assisted SME compliance and evidence pack automation
workstreams.funder_safe_summary: A back-office automation route for accounting evidence, compliance support, filing preparation, and auditable SME workflows, with clear boundaries that the system prepares evidence and does not replace regulated professional judgement.
evidence_basis: submitted PAYE evidence screenshot from user
current_ifs_fit: UK-Switzerland draft only if partner problem statement and budget are evidenced

workstreams.grant_title: Warehouse location and stock evidence automation
workstreams.funder_safe_summary: A warehouse automation route for stock and location proof, OCR review, batch ledgers, hold reasons, and operator-visible audit trails.
current_ifs_fit: UK-Switzerland draft if Swiss logistics/warehouse partner evidence is found
Maritime conversion packs only as a partner-led assurance/evidence role

workstreams.grant_title: Feasibility study for remote sensing and signal-processing concepts
workstreams.funder_safe_summary: Early-stage simulation and proof-of-principle research for remote sensing, signal processing, materials/energy concepts, and space/defence-adjacent sensing. Use only as feasibility language until an external technical partner and test protocol exist.
current_ifs_fit: No current IFS direct-submit route without external technical lead/partner
Quantum hardware route requires hardware lead partner
Space/defence-adjacent routes require separate partner scoping

claim_class_controls.meaning: Verified local software, company, portal, or file evidence.
claim_class_controls.formal_use: Can state directly when the source is cited.

claim_class_controls.meaning: Public preprint/profile/open-source evidence, not independently peer reviewed in this workspace.
claim_class_controls.formal_use: Can describe as public research output or open-source evidence.

claim_class_controls.meaning: Plausible hypothesis, prototype, or route fit that needs partner validation.
claim_class_controls.formal_use: Use only as feasibility/future work with validation plan.

claim_class_controls.meaning: Narrative, metaphysical, metaphorical, or internal operating language.
claim_class_controls.formal_use: Do not use in formal funder documents unless clearly reframed as public engagement/creative material.

language_controls.purpose: Convert Aureon internal shorthand into formal funder-safe text for IFS applications.

translations.funder_safe: background service, worker, or autonomous software agent
translations.rule: Use only when describing ordinary software operations.

translations.funder_safe: orchestration console, cognitive workflow controller, or local reasoning loop
translations.rule: Prefer orchestration console or workflow controller.

translations.funder_safe: coherence-scoring model, multi-signal pattern model, or signal-processing hypothesis
productivity, resilience, safety, explainability, and open-science language
parameterised spacing rule or golden-ratio-inspired temporal/spectral windowing
translations.rule: Only use with measurable test protocol.

translations.funder_safe: named research work packages with plain-English description and validation status
translations.rule: Define once and attach validation status.

translations.funder_safe: measurable target, risk, and validation plan

prohibited_formal_claims: validated energy extraction without external evidence
